title: MySQL
text: MySQL The MySQL DBMS connector enables you to integrate MySQL databases with Uniface. Connector Feature Description Mnemonic MQL Supported version For the supported platforms and product versions, see the Platform Availability Matrix . Supported utilities Create Table and Load Definitions are supported. Create Scripts is not supported. SQL support Supported. Stored procedures support Supported. To use the Uniface MQL U5.0 connector, you need to copy libmysql.dll from connector folder of the MySQL installation to the common/bin folder of the Uniface installation. Note: Be sure to copy the correct version. The 32-bit and 64-bit versions are not binary compatible. Related Links Support for Unicode in the MQL Connector The Uniface MQL connector can support Unicode. By default, Unicode support is disabled. Environment Considerations for MySQL Database Access on MySQL The MQL connector uses the MySQL client library to connect to the server and manipulate the DBMS. RecordManagement Naming Rules on MySQL Referential Integrity Management on MySQL Referential integrity is handled by Uniface. Data Retrieval on MySQL The offset option, order by, and where clauses of the read ProcScript statement are supported, with some restrictions. SQL Support on MySQL Both the sql ProcScript command and SQL Editor are supported. MySQL Service Stored Procedures Service stored procedures are supported for the MySQL connector. MySQL Data Packing MySQL Connector Options You can assign connector options by setting USYS$MQL_PARAMS in the [DRIVER_SETTINGS] section of the assignment file. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
